Build 4E — FESTIVAL CIRCUIT: a shot, unreleased film can now go to a film festival before it opens. Smaller, prestige, and low-budget genre films can take one of seven festivals (three marquee, four smaller) from the dashboard or Studio Calendar — big studio tentpoles and purely commercial pictures stay out. Play Festival Week day by day (Thu→Sun), field buyer offers, and choose how to release: Expand Wide, Hold for Prestige, Sell / Partner, or Pull / Rework (shelve a film the room rejected). The festival choice rides into the opening, and the Run Report tells you what it did. Loading…
